docs.title: PyBlog
docs.text: Welcome to PyBlog — a lightweight developer blog. This site is built with MkDocs (Material theme) and automatically published to GitHub Pages.

docs.title: Recent posts
docs.text:
• First Post

Subscribe and follow updates in the repository.

docs.title: Quick post workflow
docs.text:
Create new posts using the helper script which generates a date-prefixed slug filename and front matter:

python scripts/new_post.py "My New Post Title"

Or using make:

make new-post title="My New Post Title"

Files placed under docs/posts/ will automatically publish to clean slugs (e.g. /posts/my-new-post-title/).

docs.title: Example Post
docs.text:
This is a template you can copy into a new post file.

Images: put image files into the assets folder specified by images above, e.g.

![screenshot](../example-post_assets/screenshot.png)

Tags: add tags under tags: in the front matter as a YAML list.

docs.title: First Post — Getting Started
docs.text:
Welcome to the first post on PyBlog. This site uses MkDocs + Material theme and is deployed automatically to GitHub Pages.

This is a minimal, fast, and modern static blog that you can update by adding Markdown files under docs/.

Next steps:

  • Write posts in docs/posts/.
  • Add images under docs/images/ and reference them with relative paths.
  • Use the GitHub UI or git to push and the site will auto-publish.
